title: Safety Data Sheet Template
scenario: Create a basic template for a safety data sheet (SDS) that includes standard sections for hazard identification, first aid measures, and handling and storage. The template should be in a clear and concise format.
constraints: Must include the standard SDS sections
Must use clear and concise language

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated template includes the standard SDS sections and uses clear and concise language.
Verify if the template is suitable for creating a safety data sheet.
